ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (Eastern or Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (Atlantic, Central, Southeast, Northwest, Pacific, Southwest) */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("division_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference FOREIGN KEY ("conference") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (win or loss) */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "score_team" INTEGER /* Final score of the team */,
  "score_opponent" INTEGER /* Final score of the opponent */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state where the game was played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoffs, etc.) */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the main referee */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "overall_record" TEXT /* Overall win-loss record of the team */,
  "home_record" TEXT /* Home win-loss record of the team */,
  "road_record" TEXT /* Road win-loss record of the team */,
  "conference_record" TEXT /* Conference win-loss record of the team */,
  "division_record" TEXT /* Division win-loss record of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned in the standings */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of games won */,
  "last_10" TEXT /* Record in the last 10 games */,
  "streak" TEXT /* Current win/loss streak */,
  "playoff_position" TEXT /* Position in the playoffs */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the standings were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "margin_0_3_record" TEXT /* Record of the team in games decided by 3 points or less */,
  "margin_10_record" TEXT /* Record of the team in games won by 10 points or more */,
  "oct_record" TEXT /* Record of the team in October */,
  "nov_record" TEXT /* Record of the team in November */,
  "dec_record" TEXT /* Record of the team in December */,
  "jan_record" TEXT /* Record of the team in January */,
  "feb_record" TEXT /* Record of the team in February */,
  "mar_record" TEXT /* Record of the team in March */,
  "apr_record" TEXT /* Record of the team in April */,
  "average_points" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "average_rebounds" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "average_assists" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "average_steals" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "average_blocks" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful three-point shots */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful free throws */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive efficiency rating */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference (Eastern or Western) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the conference was founded */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the conference commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (Atlantic, Central, Southeast, Northwest, Pacific, Southwest) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the division was founded */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the division commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, general manager, analyst) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic was recorded in */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful field goals */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful three-point shots */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful free throws */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, shooting guard, small forward, power forward, center) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6'2') */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
